_comment: Single source of truth for the PR auto-labeler (.github/workflows/pr-autolabel.yml). Drives both label creation (sync-labels) and the set of labels Claude may choose from. The action only ever adds/removes labels listed here ('managed' labels); any other label a human applies is left untouched. Colors are hex without the leading '#'. Label names are bare (no 'type:'/'backend:' prefix): each dimension has its own color, so the color already signals which dimension a label belongs to and the shorter names stay readable. Names must therefore be unique across every dimension. The taxonomy is intentionally small so a typical PR lands 3-4 meaningful labels: exactly one 'type', up to a couple 'backend'/'semantic' highlights, and any operational 'status'. Per-dimension caps ('max') plus the global 'max_labels' budget (across the 'capped' dimensions) enforce that; within a dimension the labels are listed in priority order and caps keep the highest-priority ones. Operational 'status' labels are not 'capped' and always apply.

labels.build: Build system: nix flakes, kernel-builder build, packaging

labels.new-kernel: A brand-new kernel package is added
labels.new-backend: Adds a backend to an existing kernel
labels.upstream-sync: Syncing a kernel with its upstream source

labels.needs-rebase: Has merge conflicts with the base branch
